text.heading: OBAFEMI AWOLOWO UNIVERSITY STAFF CLUB.
RULES & REGULATIONS FOR THE SWIMMING POOL USERS
text.p: THE SWIMMING PERIOD FOR NON-MEMBERS OF THE STAFF CLUB TERMINATES AT 5-00PM EVERY SWIMMING DAY. THE PRESCRIBED FEE SHOULD BE PAID AND SHOWER SHOULD BE TAKEN BEFORE ENTERING THE POOL. SWIMMERS IN SWIMMING COSTUMES ARE RESTRICTED TO THE POOL AND GARDEN AREA. ANY ERRING (STUDENT) WILL BE SUMMARILY EJECTED AND MADE TO APPEAR BEFORE THE UNIVERSITY DISCIPLINARY COMMITTEE.

EXCEPT FOR THE MEMBERS WHO CAN SWIM, NOBODY SHOULD SWIM IN THE ABSENCE OF THE LIFE GUARD. ANY CHILD OF 12 YEARS AND UNDER SHOULD BE ACCOPANIED BY AN ADULT WHO WILL TAKE CARE OF HIM/HER BEFORE ALLOWED TO SWIM. TRAINEE SWIMMERS ARE RESTRICTED TO THE SHALLOW AREA OF THE POOL. ANY SUCH PERSONS WHO GO TO THE DEEP END DO SO AT PERSONAL RISK AND IF SEEN WILL BE SUMMARILY EJECTED. THE CLUB RESERVES THE RIGHT TO FIX THE NUMBER OF SWIMMER IN THE POOL AT ANY TIME.
STUDENT SWIMMERS ARE PROHIBITED FROM SMOKING IN THE CLUB PREMISES AND FROM PURCHASING CIGARATTES.
STUDENT SWIMMERS ARE NOT ALLOWED ACCESS TO ALCOHOLIC BUT TO BUY SNACKS AND SOFT DRINKS FROM THE BAR AND KITCHEN.
STUDENT SWIMMERS WOULD NOT BEPERMITED TO MAKE USE OF OTHER GAMES WITHIN THE CLUB PREMISES. COMPETITION ORGANISE BY THE CLUB MIGHT BE AN EXCPETION.
SWIMMERS ARE WARNED AGAINST RECKLESS DIVING THE SO CALLED POWER DIVE AND OTHERS TRICK.THE CLUB WILL NOT TAKE RESPONSIBILITY FOR ANY MISHAP THAT RESULT FROM FAILURE.

SWIMMERS ARE PROHIBITED FROM EATING, DRINKING OR DROPPING THEIR SOFT DRINKS BOTTLES WITHIN THE IMEEDIATE VICINITY OF THE SWIMMING POOL SUCH SUBSTANCES AS BROKEN BOTTLES DAMAGE THE SWIMMING POOL FILTRATION CLEARING SYSTEMS.
GENERALLY, THE CLUB RESERVED THE RIGHT TO EXPELL ANY INDIVIDUAL FROM CLUB PREMISES.
SHOULD HE/SHE BE JUDGE GUILTY OF ANY INDISCIPLINE. IN ADDITION, INDIVIDUALS BE EXPELLED WILL BE REPORTED TO THE APPROPRIATE UNIVERSITY AUTHORITY.
